We have a new message for you from Gitpay.

Hello Preview User,

A PayPal payment you made 1 year ago for the issue Sample task title was automatically refunded. This happens when a bounty stays open for more than 1 year with no merged pull request and long inactivity.

No action is required on your side. If development resumes, you can fund the bounty again from the issue page.

Field Value
Provider PayPal
Amount $ 49.99
Currency USD
Order ID order_123
Authorization ID auth_123
Capture ID cap_123
Bounty age 400 days

If you believe this is a mistake, reply to this email or contact us at contact@gitpay.me.

See your payments on Gitpay

https://gitpay.me (Web)
contact@gitpay.me (Email)
